data.jsCode: function txt(){if(message&&message.contact&&message.contact.phone_number){return String(message.contact.phone_number)}if(message&&message.text){return String(message.text).trim()}return ""}function ask(t){send_message({text:t,parse_mode:"HTML"})}function clean(){delete_context("_maintenance_step")}function norm(s,v){if(s.phone){var c=v.replace(/[^\d+]/g,"");return c[0]==="+"?c:"+"+c}return v}function valid(s,v){if(s.phone){return /^\+?\d{9,15}$/.test(v)}return v.length>=(s.min||1)}var steps=[{key:"maintenance_name",prompt:get_context("param_name_prompt")||"Texnik xizmat uchun ismni yozing:",error:"Kamida 2 ta belgi kiriting.",min:2},{key:"maintenance_asset",prompt:get_context("param_asset_prompt")||"Qaysi qurilma yoki obyekt bo'yicha xizmat kerak?",error:"Kamida 2 ta belgi kiriting.",min:2},{key:"maintenance_problem",prompt:get_context("param_problem_prompt")||"Muammoni yozing:",error:"Kamida 5 ta belgi kiriting.",min:5},{key:"maintenance_phone",prompt:get_context("param_phone_prompt")||"Telefon raqamingizni yuboring:",error:"Telefonni +998901234567 formatida yuboring.",phone:true}];var step=parseInt(get_context("_maintenance_step")||"0",10);var answer=txt();if(answer.toLowerCase()==="/cancel"){clean();exit("cancelled")}if(step>0){var prev=steps[step-1];var value=norm(prev,answer);if(!valid(prev,value)){ask(prev.error+" Bekor qilish uchun /cancel yuboring.");wait_for_input()}set_context(prev.key,value)}if(step>=steps.length){send_message({text:get_context("param_success_message")||("Texnik xizmat so'rovi qabul qilindi. 👤 "+(get_context("maintenance_name")||"")+" 🧰 "+(get_context("maintenance_asset")||"")+" 🛠 "+(get_context("maintenance_problem")||"")+" 📞 "+(get_context("maintenance_phone")||"")),parse_mode:"HTML"});clean();exit("completed")}ask(steps[step].prompt+" Bekor qilish uchun /cancel yuboring.");set_context("_maintenance_step",String(step+1));wait_for_input();
